default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Airbyte project execution and discuss broader reporting strategies for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte refresh workflow is ready; publishing to be unblocked next week](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Target: 100 article refreshes per week, starting with engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [New reporting needs emerging across clients; team exploring scalable solutions](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [SEO data limitations and potential workarounds discussed for future implementations](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

## Topics

### Airbyte Refresh Workflow Status

  - [Publishing workflow to be finalized with Ben and Nem early next week](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Current issue: AI pulling incorrect stats even when instructed not to](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Kirkland to investigate adding fact-checker to refresher grid as potential fix](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Initial sprint focus: Get content refreshed quickly, perfect quality less critical for now](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Airbyte Content Volume and Timeline

  - [Target: 100 article refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Next week's goal: \~50 articles (depending on when publishing is unblocked)](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [No Google Docs review for initial refresh sprint; direct publishing from Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### SEO Tracking and Reporting

  - [SEOtesting.com suggested, but may be unnecessary overhead](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Alternative: Custom view in Data Studio/Looker Studio with regex filtering](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Challenges with Google Search Console API limits for larger websites discussed](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Potential solution: Focus on subfolder-level metrics for more comprehensive view](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

### Client Reporting Needs

  - [Increasing demand for in-depth reporting across clients](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [George showcased a simple goal-tracking tool created for AugmentCode](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Tool helps communicate long-term value and set expectations](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Team considering integrating similar analytics view into Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/sTcxgU6SJsiSbx2KYFLxNgzw1s_syjFK?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
